_doc: Maps `Relation Name` from project/relations_catalogue_v3.tsv to one of the five ARC modules per spec §3.6.1. This file is a transition affordance until the SME folds a `Module` column directly into the TSV. Per ROADMAP §0.6, the Module column is the canonical SME deliverable; this file exists so engineering tooling can run end-to-end before that lands. Copy to module-assignments.json and fill in for every TSV row.
